prompt: Create a serene impressionist oil painting of a quiet misty lake at sunrise, evoking solitude and calm. The scene shows one great blue heron standing in shallow water near the right-center foreground among reeds, facing left, with a long orange beak, slender neck, blue-gray feathers, dark legs, and a soft reflection in the water. Surround the bird with water lilies: exactly 16 visible blossoms total, including 7 blossoms clustered on lily pads in the lower foreground, 8 blossoms scattered around the right-side lily pads near the heron, and 1 small blossom near the mid-right waterline; use pale pink and white petals with warm yellow centers. Add many rounded dark green lily pads across the lower foreground and right side. In the background, paint a glowing peach-orange sun low on the horizon over the lake, with its light reflected as a vertical golden-pink shimmer on the water. Use pastel dawn colors: peach, coral, lavender, pale yellow, and soft blue. On the far shore, include hazy blue-gray tree silhouettes fading into morning fog. On the upper right, feature a graceful weeping willow with drooping green branches and abundant pale pink blossoms leaning over the water. The overall mood should match the phrase Silence is my best friend: peaceful, contemplative, and hushed. Style: painterly impressionism with visible brushstrokes, soft edges, atmospheric mist, luminous reflections, gentle color blending, romantic landscape lighting, no text, no people, no buildings, no hard outlines. Use a wide landscape canvas, approximately 16:9.
